## Change

Describe the behavior changed and the protocol layer affected.

## Protocol checklist

- [ ] The change stays within Core, Extension, Experimental, or Adapter boundaries.
- [ ] Normative changes update `SPEC.md` and the ERC draft.
- [ ] Hashing changes update the canonical golden vector and all three verifiers.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes include negative or invariant tests.
- [ ] `pnpm check` and `pnpm audit --audit-level=moderate` pass.
- [ ] No unassigned ERC number or raw private memory was introduced.
